content: Nexus auth: OAuth2 (system browser) + legacy API key. Premium users get direct download links via getDownloadURLs (no friction, CDN server choice). Free users: FreeUserDLDialog forces manual confirm + Go Premium ad; download requires a key generated only on website embedded in the nxm:// link from Download-with-Manager button, with an expiry time. nxm:// link parses gameId/modId/fileId(+key+expires); handler resolves CDN link via API.
